from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

def update_user_profile(session: Session, user_id: int, new_name: str):
    try:
        with session.begin():
            user = session.query(User).filter_by(id=user_id).one()
            user.name = new_name
    except Exception:
        raise

def create_order_with_items(session: Session, order_data: dict, items: list):
    try:
        with session.begin():
            order = Order(**order_data)
            session.add(order)
            for item_data in items:
                item = OrderItem(order_id=order.id, **item_data)
                session.add(item)
    except Exception:
        raise
